MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TULARE SOLAR CENTER, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is granted and this case stayed pending the outcome of arbitration.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)
